Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
logic.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
Global game controller responsible for managing game-wide state outside of battle.

This class manages:

  • Hero selection and team management
  • Stage progression and monster spawning
  • Reroll tracking and upgrade selection
  • High-level GameState transitions

Most fields and methods are static, so the class behaves like a shared global game state container. UI screens typically call these methods to update team composition, spawn monsters, and move between game phases.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_TEAM_SIZE

      private static final int MAX_TEAM_SIZE
      Maximum number of heroes allowed in the player's team.
      See Also:

      private static final int MAX_REROLL
      Maximum number of rerolls allowed during hero selection or related UI.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEngine

      public GameEngine()
      Constructs the game engine and starts a new game.

      This is a convenience constructor that calls newGame().

  • Method Details

    • newGame

      public void newGame()
      Resets the entire game state to start a brand new game.

      This method:

      • Clears hero and monster teams
      • Resets stage counter and reroll usage
      • Clears selected upgrade hero
      • Creates a new MonsterFactory
      • Initializes the list of available heroes
      • Sets GameState to GameState.START_GAME

    • getAvailableHeroes

      public static List<Heroes> getAvailableHeroes()
      Returns the list of heroes that can be selected by the player.
      Returns:
      list of available heroes

    • isInTeam

      public static boolean isInTeam(Heroes hero)
      Checks whether a hero is already included in the player's team.
      Parameters:
      hero - hero to check
      Returns:
      true if the hero is already in the team, false otherwise

    • checkFullTeam

      public static boolean checkFullTeam()
      Checks whether the player's team is at maximum capacity.
      Returns:
      true if team size equals MAX_TEAM_SIZE, false otherwise

    • getHeroTEAM

      public static ArrayList<Heroes> getHeroTEAM()
      Returns the current player hero team.
      Returns:
      hero team

    • getTeamSize

      public static int getTeamSize()
      Returns the current team size.
      Returns:
      number of heroes in the team

    • toggleTeamMember

      public static boolean toggleTeamMember(Heroes hero)
      Adds or removes a hero from the player's team.

      If the hero is already in the team, the hero will be removed. If the hero is not in the team, the hero will be added only if the team is not full.

      Parameters:
      hero - hero to add or remove
      Returns:
      true if the team was changed, false if the team is full and hero could not be added

    • setUpgradeHero

      public static void setUpgradeHero(Heroes hero)
      Sets the hero that will be upgraded.
      Parameters:
      hero - hero selected for upgrade, or null to clear selection

    • getUpgradeHero

      public static Heroes getUpgradeHero()
      Returns the hero selected for upgrade.
      Returns:
      selected hero for upgrade, or null if none is selected

    • upgradingHero

      public static void upgradingHero()
      Upgrades the selected hero if one has been chosen.

      This method calls Heroes.upgrade() on the selected hero.

    • getMaxReroll

      public static int getMaxReroll()
      Returns the maximum number of rerolls allowed.
      Returns:
      maximum rerolls

    • getCountReroll

      public static int getCountReroll()
      Returns the number of rerolls already used.
      Returns:
      reroll usage count

    • setCountReroll

      public static void setCountReroll(int countReroll)
      Sets the reroll usage count.
      Parameters:
      countReroll - new reroll count

    • addCountReroll

      public static void addCountReroll(int countReroll)
      Adds to the reroll usage count.
      Parameters:
      countReroll - amount to add

    • getStageCounter

      public static int getStageCounter()
      Returns the current stage counter.
      Returns:
      stage counter

    • setStageCounter

      public static void setStageCounter(int stageCounter)
      Sets the current stage counter.
      Parameters:
      stageCounter - new stage counter

    • addStageCounter

      public static void addStageCounter(int stageCounter)
      Adds to the stage counter.
      Parameters:
      stageCounter - amount to add

    • getMonsterFactory

      public static MonsterFactory getMonsterFactory()
      Returns the MonsterFactory used by the game.
      Returns:
      monster factory

    • getMonsterTeam

      public static ArrayList<Monster> getMonsterTeam()
      Returns the current monster team.
      Returns:
      monster team

    • setMonsterTeam

      public static void setMonsterTeam()
      Spawns a new monster team for the current stage and stores it in MONSTER_TEAM.

      This method delegates monster creation to MonsterFactory.spawnMonster(int).

    • clearMonsterTeam

      public static void clearMonsterTeam()
      Clears the monster team list.

      If the monster team list is null, it will be initialized to an empty list.

    • isHeroAllDead

      public static boolean isHeroAllDead()
      Checks whether all heroes in the player team are dead.
      Returns:
      true if all heroes are dead, false otherwise

    • isMonsterAllDead

      public static boolean isMonsterAllDead()
      Checks whether all monsters in the monster team are dead.
      Returns:
      true if all monsters are dead, false otherwise

    • getGameState

      public static GameState getGameState()
      Returns the current game state.
      Returns:
      current game state

    • setGameState

      public static void setGameState(GameState gameState)
      Sets the current game state.
      Parameters:
      gameState - new game state
